title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF MALUKO, PROVINCE OF BUKIDNON, TO MUNICIPALITY OF MANOLO FORTICH.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5413 / 53 OG No. 16, 5147 (August 31, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1720, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF MALUKO, PROVINCE OF BUKIDNON, TO MUNICIPALITY OF MANOLO FORTICH.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Municipality of Maluko, Province of Bukidnon, is changed to Municipality of Manolo Fortich.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
